problem id: a62417fe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01011111 -> 10110101
  10110001 -> 01110100
  11010000 -> 10111010
  00101100 -> 01011101
  01010000 -> 10101010
  00001011 -> 00010111
  11110000 -> 11111110
  01101101 -> 11010111
  01100010 -> 11001000
  01011001 -> 10111001

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 01000110
